g.text: · tanh饱和动力学情绪演化方程 E_t = tanh(α·E_{t-1}+γ·Φ_t)

text.style: font-size: 7.2px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #333333

g.text: · α=0.7, γ=2.0；Φ_t = w_s·缺货率 + w_m·精准匹配度 + w_e·过度积压率

text.style: font-size: 7.2px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #333333

g.text: · 损失厌恶系数 (1.5, 2.5) 使有效缺货惩罚放大约70%
